articles.title: Emerytura bez tajemnic. Siedem zasad, które warto znać
articles.summary: Zanim ZUS wypłaci pierwsze świadczenie emerytalne, osoby kończące karierę zawodową powinny dobrze przemyśleć swoje dalsze kroki. Wysokość emerytury zależy o kilku czynników, przy czym nawet resort zachęca do postępowania według siedmiu zasad, aby określić optymalne dla siebie warunki i moment przejścia na emeryturę.

articles.title: NFL, Paramount discussing media deal that could mean CBS pays an extra $1 billion or more
articles.summary: The NFL is discussing getting rid of its 2029-30 opt-out clause in exchange for an increase on TV rights that could push CBS to pay more than $3 billion a year.

articles.title: Apollo's John Zito questions private equity's software valuations: 'All the marks are wrong'
articles.summary: While Wall Street figures have flagged risks in private credit, Apollo's Zito is among the first within private credit to candidly acknowledge weakness.

articles.title: Peloton is launching bikes and treadmills for gyms, accelerating commercial strategy
articles.summary: Peloton is launching commercial gym-ready Bikes and Treads, expanding into gyms globally as it seeks new growth beyond its at-home fitness business.

articles.title: Mortgage rates surge to highest since September, hitting spring housing market
articles.summary: Mortgage rates jumped to a seven-month high Friday as war in Iran pushed bond yields higher.

articles.title: Starbucks union sent the company a proposed contract. Here's what baristas want
articles.summary: Discussions between Starbucks and the union representing about 6% of its company-owned U.S. stores hit a wall last year.

articles.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
articles.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.

articles.title: Flights are already getting more expensive after a jet fuel spike. When should you book?
articles.summary: Some airlines are already raising fares after a historic surge in jet-fuel costs.

articles.title: How the Iran war could start to impact U.S. retail prices
articles.summary: The retail industry could soon be taking the next hit from the Iran war's disruption to the global supply chain.

articles.title: EV maker Lucid reveals plans for robotaxi, positive free cash flow late this decade
articles.summary: The EV company is aiming to hit that target through market expansion into midsize vehicles, robotaxis and new counties, specifically in Europe.

articles.title: The biggest names missing from the list of America's top philanthropists
